title: Diagnostics Platform Capabilities Environment Admission
problem: Add one source-scoped diagnostics environment admission surface for launch-time platform capability posture so Wayland-only docking campaigns can skip honestly on non-Wayland hosts.

repro.summary: Validate the new platform.capabilities environment source and the Wayland real-host campaign manifest.
commands: cargo run -p fretboard-dev -- diag campaign validate tools/diag-campaigns/imui-p3-wayland-real-host.json --json

cargo nextest run -p fret-bootstrap --features "ui-app-driver diagnostics diagnostics-ws" environment_sources_get_ack_publishes_transport_session_monitor_topology refresh_environment_source_files_publishes_launch_time_platform_capabilities_sidecar --no-fail-fast

gates.name: bootstrap-publication
gates.command: cargo nextest run -p fret-bootstrap --features "ui-app-driver diagnostics diagnostics-ws" refresh_environment_source_files_publishes_launch_time_platform_capabilities_sidecar environment_sources_get_ack_publishes_transport_session_monitor_topology --no-fail-fast

gates.name: wayland-campaign-validate
gates.command: cargo run -p fretboard-dev -- diag campaign validate tools/diag-campaigns/imui-p3-wayland-real-host.json --json

continue_policy.notes: This follow-on only admits platform.capabilities for exact launch-time platform posture checks. Do not widen requires_environment into generic boolean expressions here; open a new narrow lane if a third source or combination semantics becomes necessary.
